questions.q: Identify the prepositional phrase in the following sentence: 'The clever fox hid quietly behind the thick bushes.'
Which plural noun is spelled incorrectly?
Choose the best pronoun to replace the underlined phrase: '<u>The local volunteers</u> cleaned up the trash along the riverbanks.'
What is an antonym for the word 'rigid'?
Use context clues to determine the meaning of the word 'perched': 'The small bluebird was perched on the high telephone wire, looking down at the grassy yard.'

Read the text: 'The first successful hot air balloon flight took place in Paris, France, in 1783. Instead of carrying human passengers, the balloon carried a sheep, a duck, and a rooster. The designers wanted to see if animals could survive high in the air before risking a human life. The large balloon was made of paper and cloth, and it used hot air from a wood fire to float into the sky. The flight lasted for eight minutes and covered two miles before landing safely in a meadow.' What was the author's primary purpose in writing this text?
options: To convince readers to go on a hot air balloon ride.
To inform readers about the historic first hot air balloon flight and its passengers.
To explain how to build a modern hot air balloon using paper.
To tell a funny fictional story about animals escaping from a farm.
questions.answer: To inform readers about the historic first hot air balloon flight and its passengers.

questions.q: Based on the hot air balloon text, what can you infer about the balloon's designers?
options: They were careless inventors who did not plan ahead.
They valued human safety and wanted to test the flight conditions first.
They were farmers who wanted to transport animals across France.
They preferred flying over land rather than water.
questions.answer: They valued human safety and wanted to test the flight conditions first.

options: We needed to find water, shelter and dry firewood before the sun set.
We needed to find water, shelter, and dry firewood before the sun set.
We needed to find water shelter and dry firewood before the sun set.
We needed to find, water, shelter, and dry firewood, before the sun set.
questions.answer: We needed to find water, shelter, and dry firewood before the sun set.

questions.q: Identify the complete sentence that does NOT contain a fragment or run-on.
options: While we were walking down the long trail toward the lake.
The computer network went down, the technician arrived quickly to fix it.
The historical society archive contains hundreds of antique maps.
Through the lens of the powerful science lab microscope.
questions.answer: The historical society archive contains hundreds of antique maps.

questions.q: Choose the option that correctly identifies the part of speech of the underlined word: 'The heavy rain fell <u>steadily</u> throughout the long night.'
